THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFFS REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIRO ANTONIO VILLANUEVA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
